{{Quote|The central market [of Ithaqua Station] is similar to those found in any spaceport town.|Anonymous|<ref name="Republic 79">[[Republic 79|''Republic'' 79]]</ref>}}
'''Ithaqua Station''' was a [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]] [[City/Legends|town]] on the icy [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Toola/Legends|Toola]]. It was known for its large central market and for being the site of the planet's [[Toola Spaceport|main spaceport]].

==Description==
Ithaqua Station was a small spaceport town/station, that floated on-top of a half-frozen body of water located somewhere on Toola.<ref name="ITU" />

The town was home to a bustling central market, where rich [[Slavery/Legends|slave]] owners were known to buy merchandise. The station was also home to the planet's main spaceport which could only be accessed by a lift, as it was located on top of a large cliff.<ref name="ITU" />

==History==
Shortly after the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], when [[Order 66/Legends|Order 66]] was issued by [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Darth Sidious|Palpatine]], a [[Garrison/Legends|garrison]] of [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]], led by [[Clone Commander/Legends|clone trooper commander]] [[Keller (clone commander)|Keller]], was established in Ithaqua Station. The garrison was sent there in order to capture two [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] fugitives who escaped the contingency order.<ref name="ITU" />

Shortly after arriving at Ithaqua Station, [[Keller's unit]] began to thoroughly search the spaceport town and raid several locations, including a bar which was celebrating the end of the war. When commander Keller and his troopers raided the bar, an all out brawl began between the clones and citizens after one of the Jedi fugitives, [[Kai Hudorra]], convinced the bar patrons to attack the clones. The fight allowed the Jedi to escape, and later flee the planet with his [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] aboard a [[Transport/Legends|transport]] that was headed to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].<ref name="ITU" />
